# Hibachi Chef Insurance — Contractors Choice Agency

Specialty liability and business insurance for hibachi chefs, teppanyaki restaurants, and private event hibachi services through Contractors Choice Agency.

## Contact
- Phone: 844-967-5247
- Email: josh@contractorschoiceagency.com
- Address: 12220 E Riggs Road Suite #105, Chandler AZ 85249
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8am-5pm Arizona (MST)

## Pages
- Home (/) — Overview of hibachi restaurant insurance, value props, coverage highlights
- Coverage (/coverage) — Detailed coverage types for hibachi and teppanyaki operations
- Quote (/quote) — Free quote request form for hibachi restaurant insurance
- About (/about) — About Contractors Choice Agency and Josh Cotner

## Coverage Types
- General Liability — Third-party injuries, customer property damage, open-flame/teppanyaki exposure
- Workers Compensation — Burns, cuts, kitchen injuries for chefs and restaurant staff
- Commercial Property — Building, equipment, inventory including hibachi grills and ventilation
- Liquor Liability — Coverage for sake, beer, cocktails served alongside hibachi dining
- Equipment Breakdown — Commercial grills, ventilation systems, refrigeration
- Business Interruption — Lost revenue during downtime from fire, disaster, or equipment failure
